roa.docketEntryComment: PEOPLE'S MOT TO CONTINUE PRELIM HRG FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & DA MOTION TO CONTINUE/X:THE PEOPLE WITHDRAW THEIR MOTION TO CONTINUE/WITEXCL:DEFENSE/WIT SWORN:NARMINA EFENDY    /X:PETERFITZPATRICK IS APPOINTED TO REPRESENTTHE WITNESS, THE WITNESS IS NOT REQUIRED TO TESTIFY FURTHER/WIT SWORN:FIDAN EFENDY/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1, PHOTOGRAPH OF WOMAN'S FACE; PEOPLE'S 2, PHOTOGRAPH OF RED KNIFE HANDLE; PEOPLE'S 3,PHOTOGRAPH OF BATHROOM    /X:THE MAGISTRATE FINDS THAT OFFENSE OF PC 236 SHOWN BY THE EVIDENCE, HAS BEEN COMMITTED; THAT THERE IS SUFFICIENT CAUSE TOBELIEVE THE ABOVE NAMED DEFENDANT GUILTY THEREOF, IT IS ORDERED THAT SAIDDEFENDANT BE HELD TO ANSWERTO THE SAME,/HTA1:1/871D:2/X:COUNT 3 IS CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT/DEF:REMAINS ON SURETY BOND/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 06-26-14/987,2/BAIL:53,000/SA1: NARMINA EFENDY AND FIDAN EFENDY/SA2:638 36TH AVE,, SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:INFO WILL NOT BE FILED PER DISTRICT ATTY/BE/SATERM/
